title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises:
Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises!
